intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC诉讼常态化，EPO扩容与AI专利激增
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Litigation Normalizes as EPO Expands and AI Patents Surge
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年欧洲IP态势呈现司法活跃与行政扩容并行的特征。统一专利法院（UPC）案件审理进入常态化，PMAC调解机制上线及多起高价值专利无效判决显示其司法影响力深化。EPO迎来摩尔多瓦加入，体系覆盖扩大，同时AI相关专利申请激增推动审查标准趋同。欧盟在地理标志保护及版权报酬立法上取得突破，强调创新与合规并重。整体而言，欧洲IP环境正从单纯的权利授予转向高效争议解决与高标准合规监管的双轨驱动。
top_signals: UPC米兰与巴黎分部连续作出撤销高价值专利判决，显示法院对有效性审查趋严
EPO正式接纳摩尔多瓦为第40个成员国，欧洲专利地理覆盖进一步扩展
德国DPMA数据显示AI领域专利申请量大幅领跑，技术竞争焦点转移
EUIPO与EIF合作启动，知识产权质押融资机制有望解锁中小企业资金瓶颈
cross_currents: 司法效率提升：UPC通过新案件管理系统和PMAC调解服务，显著缩短纠纷解决周期，降低维权成本
审查标准统一：EPO完成第二轮实践趋同，宽泛权利要求界定更清晰，增强法律确定性
合规边界收紧：欧盟法院在商标欺骗性、GDPR及反歧视领域的裁决，要求企业强化内容与伦理合规
implications: 中国车企需警惕5G/SEP许可谈判压力，诺基亚与吉利和解案预示全球专利战趋于和解但费率刚性
医药与科技企业应重新评估UPC诉讼策略，鉴于专利被无效风险增加，需加强前置FTO分析
出口企业需关注瑞士引入实质审查及EPODOCX提交便利化，优化申请流程以降低成本并提高获权率
watchlist: UPC PMAC调解程序在SEP/FRAND纠纷中的实际应用效果及费率参考
EPO第三轮实践趋同中关于分案申请与互联网披露的具体实施指南
欧盟成员国转化新闻出版者在线使用公平报酬指令的国内法细节

daily_report.headline_zh: 吉利和解5G诉讼，英法院限分销禁令
daily_report.headline_en: Geely-Nokia SEP Settlement and UK Distribution Ruling Define IP Week
daily_report.executive_line: 本周核心在于SEP纠纷降温与反垄断执法细化：吉利与诺基亚达成全球和解，英国上诉法院明确在线分销限制需个案评估，EPO体系认证稳固运营预期。
daily_report.summary_zh: 本窗口期欧洲IP战情呈现‘诉讼缓和、规则细化’态势。吉利撤回对诺基亚的5G侵权诉讼并达成全球和解，标志车联网SEP博弈进入许可常态化阶段。英国上诉法院在分销体系中确立‘非自动违法’原则，为品牌方线上管控提供合规空间。同时，EPO通过ISO审核及EUIPO扩展巴尔干合作，显示机构层面正强化标准对齐与运营韧性。瑞士专利法引入实质审查，预示申请策略需提前调整。

storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 终结长期拉锯，确认车企加入Avanci池为快速解决SEP纠纷的主流路径。

storylines.why_it_matters_en: This settlement validates Avanci pool licensing as a primary resolution pathway for automotive SEP disputes, reducing reliance on fragmented national court injunctions.

storylines.what_happened_en: The UK Court of Appeal overturned a lower ruling, determining that restricting authorized retailers from selling on unbranded discount websites does not inherently violate competition law.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: Brands gain legal leverage to protect premium positioning and prevent free-riding in selective distribution networks, provided restrictions are objectively justified and non-discriminatory.

storylines.why_it_matters_en: Applicants must reassess filing budgets and freedom-to-operate strategies, leveraging new provisions for English-language technical documents to streamline prosecution.

storylines.why_it_matters_en: Rights holders must monitor judicial interpretations of the repair clause and adapt security protocols against digital leaks to preserve novelty and enforceability of registered designs.

storylines.what_happened_en: The Munich Regional Court confirmed the withdrawal of Nokia’s infringement claim regarding EP 3 566 488, signaling a broader trend toward negotiated settlements in connected car litigation.

report_items.title_zh: EPO成功完成ISO监督审核
report_items.title_en: EPO Maintains ISO Certifications Following Successful Surveillance Audit
report_items.title: EPO successfully completes ISO surveillance audit
report_items.summary_zh: 2026年4月，欧洲专利局（EPO）顺利通过外部审计机构的管理体系ISO监督审核。此次审核确认了EPO在质量管理、职业健康安全、信息安全和环境管理方面的稳健性，维持了其ISO 9001、ISO 45001、ISO 27001及ISO 14001认证。这体现了EPO对国际标准及合规性的承诺，并通过综合管理体系支持高质量服务交付。
report_items.summary_en: In April 2026, the European Patent Office (EPO) successfully completed its periodic ISO surveillance audit conducted by external auditors. The review confirmed the continued robustness and maturity of the EPO’s integrated management systems, allowing the organization to maintain its certifications for quality management (ISO 9001), occupational health and safety (ISO 45001), information security (ISO 27001), and environmental management (ISO 14001). This outcome underscores the EPO’s adherence to international standards and regulatory compliance. By aligning policies, processes, and controls w...
core_points_zh: EPO于2026年4月通过外部审计机构的ISO管理体系监督审核
维持ISO 9001、45001、27001及14001四项国际认证，确认体系成熟稳健
通过综合管理体系整合政策流程，确保持续改进及服务交付质量
core_points_en: The EPO passed its April 2026 external ISO surveillance audit, confirming ongoing adherence to international management standards.
Certifications maintained include ISO 9001 for quality, ISO 27001 for information security, ISO 45001 for safety, and ISO 14001 for environment.
The EPO utilizes an Integrated Management System to unify policies and controls, supporting service quality and continuous operational improvement.
report_items.insight_zh: 此新闻属于EPO内部行政与合规动态，不直接改变专利实体法或审查标准。实务中需关注其信息安全（ISO 27001）与质量管理（ISO 9001）的持续合规，这间接保障了电子提交系统及审查流程的稳定性与数据安全性，是评估EPO服务可靠性的基础指标。
report_items.insight_en: This update confirms the administrative and operational stability of the EPO rather than introducing changes to substantive patent law or examination guidelines. For rights holders and legal practitioners, the maintenance of ISO 27001 and ISO 9001 certifications serves as a key indicator of the reliability and data security standards underpinning the EPO’s electronic filing systems and procedural workflows. While thi...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: EPO运营稳定性与数据安全合规性保障
Practice note/实务观察: 关注EPO管理体系认证状态对服务连续性的影响
What to monitor/后续观察: 无具体法律变动，仅需知悉机构合规状态更新
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Confirms the stability and data security compliance of EPO operations, indirectly supporting the reliability of electronic submission channels and case processin…
Practice note: Monitor the status of EPO management system certifications as baseline indicators for service continuity and operational maturity.
What to monitor: No immediate legal or procedural changes; treat as routine compliance confirmation regarding institutional operational standards.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟资助IP合作扩展至西巴尔干地区
report_items.title_en: EUIPO Launches EU-Funded IP Cooperation Project in Western Balkans
report_items.title: EU-funded IP cooperation expands into the Western Balkans
report_items.summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，一项新的欧盟资助合作项目正在与扩大伙伴国开展，旨在支持这些国家在加入欧盟之前实现知识产权标准的对齐。该项目由欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）发布，聚焦于通过合作促进法律与实践的协调，为未来的欧盟成员资格做准备。
report_items.summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has announced a new cooperation project funded by the European Union. This initiative targets enlargement partners in the Western Balkans, aiming to support the alignment of their intellectual property standards with those of the European Union. The project serves as a preparatory measure for these countries ahead of potential future EU accession.
core_points_zh: 标题显示欧盟资助的新合作项目已扩展至西巴尔干地区
原文摘要显示项目旨在支持伙伴国在入盟前对齐欧盟知识产权标准
core_points_en: A new EU-funded cooperation project targets enlargement partners in the Western Balkans region.
The initiative focuses on aligning local intellectual property standards with European Union frameworks.
The project supports regulatory harmonization efforts preceding potential EU accession.
report_items.insight_zh: Practice note / What to monitor：需持续观察该合作项目的具体实施范围、涵盖的知识产权领域（如商标、专利或外观设计）以及具体的时间表。鉴于正文信息有限，目前仅能确认其为入盟前的标准对齐举措，尚无法评估对特定行业权利人的直接影响。
report_items.insight_en: This development highlights ongoing regulatory convergence efforts between the EU and candidate countries. For rights holders operating across Europe, monitoring the implementation of these alignment measures is relevant for understanding future market entry conditions and enforcement landscapes in the Western Balkans. The focus remains on legislative and administrative harmonization rather than immediate procedural...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should track regulatory alignment in the Western Balkans to anticipate future market integration and enforcement environments.
Practice note: The project emphasizes pre-accession standard alignment, indicating long-term legislative harmonization goals for IP systems in the region.
What to monitor: Specific timelines, covered IP sectors, and detailed implementation steps of the cooperation project remain to be defined.

report_items.title_zh: UPC官方2025年度回顾：五大亮点解析
report_items.title_en: UPC Annual Review 2025: Five Key Highlights from the Court's Second Official Report
report_items.title: Official UPC Year in Review – Five highlights from 2025
report_items.summary_zh: Bristows律所发布分析，解读统一专利法院（UPC）发布的2025年官方年度回顾报告。该报告是UPC的第二份年度报告，全面梳理了2025年的机构活动、案件趋势及运营发展。文章从中提炼出五个对UPC用户至关重要的亮点，旨在帮助利益相关者更好地理解UPC的最新动态与司法实践走向，为在欧专利诉讼策略提供参考依据。
report_items.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) has published its second official Annual Review, detailing institutional activity, case trends, and operational developments throughout 2025. Bristows analyzes this report, extracting five specific highlights deemed most relevant for UPC users. This overview provides essential context on the court's evolving practices and statistical performance during its second full year of operation.
core_points_zh: UPC发布第二份官方年度回顾，全面展示2025年机构活动与案件趋势
报告详细分析了UPC的运营发展状况，为法律从业者提供关键数据支持
文章提炼五大核心亮点，聚焦对UPC用户最具参考价值的实务动态
core_points_en: The UPC released its second Annual Review, offering a comprehensive statistical and operational overview of the court's activities in 2025.
Bristows identifies five key highlights from the report that provide critical insights into current case trends and procedural developments.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This annual review serves as a primary reference for understanding the UPC's operational trajectory and judicial tendencies. Rights holders and legal teams should examine these highlights to align their European patent enforcement expectations with the court's actual caseload management and procedural evolution.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The report offers data-driven insights into UPC activity levels, helping rights holders contextualize litigation timelines and court capacity.
Practice note: Legal practitioners should review the identified highlights to stay updated on emerging procedural norms and case management trends within the UPC.
What to monitor: Future updates to the UPC's annual reporting will likely continue to shape expectations regarding case volume distribution and operational efficiency.

report_items.title_zh: 英国上诉法院就选择性分销体系在线限制发布指引
report_items.title_en: UK Court of Appeal Clarifies Online Sales Restrictions in Selective Distribution Systems
report_items.title: UK Court of Appeal issues guidance on online restrictions in selective distribution systems
report_items.summary_zh: 英国上诉法院在Deckers诉Up & Running案中裁定，品牌方禁止授权零售商在未品牌折扣网站销售不违反竞争法，推翻竞争上诉法庭原判。法院确认此类在线限制需结合法律与经济背景评估损害程度，而非自动违法。此举虽未放松对转售价格维持等核心限制的执法，但强调品牌应建立透明、客观的分销标准以规避诉讼风险。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Court of Appeal overturned a Competition Appeal Tribunal ruling, holding that Deckers did not breach competition law by preventing an authorised retailer from selling on an unbranded discount website. The judgment confirms that restrictions on online channels within selective distribution systems are not automatically illegal. Instead, they require a careful assessment of legal and economic context to establish a sufficient degree of harm, aligning with established case law such as Coty. While this clarifies the treatment of channel restrictions, it does not signal leniency towards hard...
core_points_zh: 在线销售限制非自动违法，需个案评估法律经济背景及损害程度
上诉法院推翻初审判决，支持品牌方管控未品牌折扣渠道的合规性
企业应避免价格固定等核心限制，通过透明标准降低反垄断诉讼风险
core_points_en: Restrictions on online sales channels in selective distribution are not presumed illegal but require contextual analysis of harm.
The Court of Appeal ruled that banning sales on unbranded discount websites by authorised retailers does not inherently breach competition law.
Hardcore restrictions such as resale price maintenance and blanket online bans remain strictly prohibited under current enforcement standards.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国出口欧洲的品牌商需警惕选择性分销中的在线限制合规性。建议避免直接禁止线上销售或固定价格，转而制定基于品牌形象和防止搭便车的客观准入标准。完善合同条款与证据留存，可有效应对潜在的反垄断调查与民事诉讼，保障供应链稳定。
report_items.insight_en: This decision provides important clarity for brands operating selective distribution networks in the UK and EU. It reinforces that channel architecture controls can be lawful if justified by brand positioning or network integrity, rather than being treated as per se violations. However, rights holders must distinguish these legitimate quality controls from hardcore anti-competitive practices. Maintaining transparent...
insight_points_zh: 制定基于品牌定位的客观分销标准，避免 blanket ban 线上销售
严禁转售价格维持等核心限制，完善合规文档以应对反垄断审查
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands can defend channel restrictions by demonstrating they protect brand image and prevent free-riding, avoiding automatic illegality findings.
Practice note: Document transparent, objective criteria for selective distribution models, specifically regarding website standards and third-party marketplace usage.
What to monitor: Continued enforcement actions against resale price maintenance and online sales restrictions by the European Commission and national competition authorities.

report_items.title_en: Switzerland Reforms Patent Act with Mandatory Searches and Optional Substantive Examination
report_items.title: Switzerland introduces substantive examinations with Patent Act reform
report_items.summary_zh: 2024年3月，瑞士联邦议会通过《专利法》部分修订案。此次改革核心在于引入强制性的现有技术检索，并允许申请人选择是否进行全面的实质审查。此外，新规接受英文技术文件，并建立了新的上诉系统。这一变革标志着瑞士从形式审查向更严格的审查模式转变，旨在提升专利质量与法律确定性，对在该国进行专利布局的企业将产生深远影响。
report_items.summary_en: In March 2024, the Swiss Federal Assembly passed a partial revision of the Patent Act, introducing significant procedural changes. Key amendments include the implementation of a mandatory prior-art search and an optional full substantive examination system. The reform also allows for the acceptance of English-language technical documents and establishes a new appeal mechanism. These measures mark a shift towards enhanced patent quality and legal certainty within the Swiss jurisdiction.
core_points_zh: 瑞士联邦议会于2024年3月通过《专利法》部分修订案
引入强制性现有技术检索及可选的全面实质审查机制
接受英文技术文档并建立全新的专利上诉系统
core_points_en: The revised Swiss Patent Act introduces a mandatory prior-art search requirement for all patent applications filed in Switzerland.
Applicants may now opt for a full substantive examination, moving beyond the previous formal examination framework.
The reform permits the submission of English-language technical documents and implements a new appellate structure.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业赴瑞士申请专利需适应新流程，强制检索可能增加前期成本与时间。建议提前规划现有技术分析，利用英文文件便利降低翻译成本。同时，关注实质审查的可选性，根据商业价值权衡投入，以应对更高的授权门槛和潜在的驳回风险。
report_items.insight_en: This legislative update alters the procedural landscape for patent registration in Switzerland. Rights holders should note the introduction of mandatory searches and the option for substantive review, which may impact prosecution timelines and grant probabilities. The acceptance of English documentation offers potential administrative efficiencies for international applicants managing European portfolios.
insight_points_zh: 适应强制检索要求，优化前期现有技术分析与预算规划
善用英文文件政策降低成本，审慎评估实质审查的商业必要性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor how the optional substantive examination affects grant rates and portfolio strength in the Swiss market.
Practice note: Leverage the new allowance for English-language technical documents to streamline filing procedures where applicable.
What to monitor: Track the implementation timeline and specific guidelines for the newly established appeal system.

report_items.title_zh: 诺基亚撤回对吉利车联网专利诉讼
report_items.title_en: Nokia Withdraws Munich Infringement Action Against Geely in Connected Car SEP Dispute
report_items.title: Nokia withdraws action against Geely in connected cars dispute
report_items.summary_zh: 慕尼黑地区法院确认诺基亚已撤回原定于今日开庭的对吉利侵权诉讼。该诉讼涉及用于联网汽车的4G和5G标准必要专利（EP 3 566 488和EP 3 832 976）。此举暗示双方可能达成和解，吉利或已获取Avanci许可。平行案件EP 976的听证会仍定于7月15日进行，但预计也将很快结束。
report_items.summary_en: The Munich Regional Court has confirmed that Nokia withdrew its patent infringement lawsuit against Geely, which was scheduled for an oral hearing on May 21, 2026. The action concerned European Patent EP 3 566 488, a standard-essential patent (SEP) related to 4G and 5G technologies used in connected vehicles. This withdrawal suggests the parties may have reached a settlement, potentially involving an Avanci license, similar to recent agreements with other automotive manufacturers. A parallel proceeding concerning another SEP, EP 3 832 976, remains scheduled for July 15, though further withdraw...
core_points_zh: 慕尼黑地区法院确认诺基亚撤回了对吉利的侵权诉讼，原定听证会取消
涉案专利为用于联网汽车的4G和5G标准必要专利EP 3 566 488和EP 3 83…
诉讼撤回暗示双方可能和解，吉利或已加入Avanci许可池
core_points_en: Nokia withdrew its infringement claim against Geely regarding EP 3 566 488 at the Munich Regional Court just before the scheduled hearing.
The dispute involves SEPs essential to 4G and 5G standards utilized in connected car systems, highlighting ongoing licensing tensions.
A parallel case concerning EP 3 832 976 is still listed for July 15, but observers expect this action may also be withdrawn shortly.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案反映了SEP许可谈判中诉讼策略的动态调整。吉利作为主要汽车制造商，其是否通过Avanci解决纠纷具有行业风向标意义。需密切关注平行案件EP 976的进展及UPC相关程序的后续状态，以评估和解范围及对其他中国车企的潜在示范效应。
report_items.insight_en: This development signals a potential shift in litigation strategy within the connected car sector, where rights holders increasingly favor licensing settlements over prolonged court battles. For portfolio managers and in-house counsel, the likely resolution via an Avanci license underscores the importance of monitoring industry-wide licensing trends rather than relying solely on judicial outcomes. It also raises ques...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders and implementers should assess whether settlement via pool licensing like Avanci offers greater certainty than continued litigation in Munich or t…
Practice note: Monitor if this withdrawal pattern becomes common in connected car SEP disputes, potentially reducing the docket for national courts and the Unified Patent Court.
What to monitor: Track the status of the parallel Munich case (EP 3 832 976) and any subsequent announcements from Geely or Nokia regarding broader licensing frameworks.

report_items.title_zh: EUIPO领导层称IP体系必须适应变化以生存
report_items.title_en: EUIPO Leaders Warn IP System Must Adapt to AI and Online Enforcement Challenges
report_items.title: IP system must adapt to survive, say EUIPO leaders
report_items.summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，欧洲顶级知识产权官员指出，从人工智能生成内容到在线执法纠纷，现有的法律框架正面临前所未有的考验。EUIPO领导层强调IP系统必须适应这些挑战才能生存。由于正文材料仅为摘要片段，未提供具体适应措施或详细政策细节。
report_items.summary_en: Senior officials at the European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) have stated that the existing intellectual property legal framework is facing unprecedented pressure. The challenges stem primarily from the rise of artificial intelligence-generated content and complex disputes regarding online enforcement, necessitating significant adaptation for the system's continued viability.
core_points_zh: 标题与摘要显示EUIPO领导层认为IP体系需适应变化以确保持续生存
原文指出AI生成内容及在线执法纠纷使现有法律框架面临前所未有的测试
core_points_en: EUIPO leadership asserts that the current IP legal framework is being tested more severely than ever before by modern technological developments.
Key pressures on the system include the proliferation of AI-generated content and ongoing difficulties in resolving online enforcement disputes.
report_items.insight_zh: Practice note: 鉴于正文信息有限，目前仅能确认欧盟IP高层对AI和在线执法挑战的关注。后续需观察EUIPO是否发布具体的政策更新、指南或立法建议以应对上述挑战，以及这些动态对商标权利人在数字环境下的维权策略可能产生的影响。
report_items.insight_en: This commentary highlights high-level recognition within the EUIPO that current regulations may be insufficient for emerging digital realities. For rights holders and practitioners, this signals potential future shifts in policy or guidance. As specific measures are not detailed in this brief excerpt, stakeholders should track subsequent official communications for concrete regulatory responses.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should note senior EUIPO acknowledgment that AI and online enforcement issues are straining the current legal framework.
Practice note: With limited detail available, practitioners should await further EUIPO statements regarding specific adaptations to the IP system.
What to monitor: Future EUIPO publications, policy updates, or legislative proposals addressing AI-generated content and online enforcement mechanisms.

report_items.title_zh: 兰博基尼揭秘保护超跑机密的设计权争夺战
report_items.title_en: Lamborghini Legal Head Addresses New Threats to Supercar Design Protection
report_items.title: Lamborghini reveals the hidden race to protect supercar secrecy
report_items.summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，兰博基尼法务负责人正应对设计保护面临的新威胁，包括间谍照片、AI生成图像以及欧盟的维修条款（repair clause）。文章主要探讨这些新兴因素对超级跑车外观设计保密性及法律保护构成的挑战。
report_items.summary_en: The head of legal at Lamborghini has highlighted emerging challenges to design protection in the automotive sector. Key concerns include the proliferation of spy shots and AI-generated images, which threaten the secrecy of new vehicle launches. Additionally, the EU's repair clause is identified as a significant legal factor impacting the scope of design rights for spare parts and visible components.
core_points_zh: 兰博基尼法务负责人指出间谍照片和AI生成图像构成设计保护新威胁
欧盟维修条款（repair clause）被视为影响外观设计保护的关键法律因素之一
core_points_en: Spy shots and AI-generated images are cited as new threats compromising supercar design secrecy.
The EU repair clause is recognized as a critical legal element affecting design protection scope.
report_items.insight_zh: 实务观察：需关注欧盟维修条款在具体司法实践中的适用边界，以及AI生成内容对现有外观设计新颖性判断标准的潜在冲击。后续应监测兰博基尼及相关车企在应对此类非传统侵权手段时的具体合规策略与诉讼动向。
report_items.insight_en: This commentary highlights the intersection of technological disruption and evolving EU design law. For rights holders, understanding how non-traditional disclosures like AI imagery interact with novelty requirements is essential. The mention of the repair clause underscores the need to monitor legislative impacts on component-level protection.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Automotive brands must assess risks from digital leaks and AI content regarding design novelty.
Practice note: Monitor the application of the EU repair clause to determine its effect on protected spare parts.
What to monitor: Future enforcement actions or policy updates concerning AI-generated visual content and design rights.

report_items.title_zh: 诺基亚与中国车企吉利达成全球5G专利和解
report_items.title_en: Nokia Settles Global 5G Patent Dispute With Geely As Avanci Adds New Licensee
report_items.title: Nokia settles global 5G patent dispute with Chinese automaker Geely
report_items.summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，Avanci宣布与一家未具名中国车企签署4G和5G许可协议。同时，Avanci被许可人Longhorn IP透露，其已终止近期针对吉利在德国提起的诉讼。标题指出诺基亚已与吉利达成全球5G专利纠纷和解。
report_items.summary_en: Nokia has settled its global 5G patent dispute with Chinese automaker Geely. Concurrently, the Avanci licensing platform announced new 4G and 5G licenses with an unnamed Chinese car manufacturer. Additionally, Avanci licensor Longhorn IP confirmed it terminated a recently filed lawsuit against Geely in Germany, signaling further resolution in ongoing automotive SEP licensing negotiations.
core_points_zh: 标题显示诺基亚已与中国汽车制造商吉利达成全球5G专利纠纷和解
Avanci宣布与一家未具名的中国新汽车公司签署了4G和5G许可协议
Avanci被许可人Longhorn IP终止了近期在德国针对吉利提起的诉讼
core_points_en: Nokia reached a settlement resolving its global 5G standard essential patent dispute with Geely.
Avanci secured new 4G and 5G licensing agreements with an additional unnamed Chinese vehicle manufacturer.
Longhorn IP terminated its pending litigation against Geely within the German jurisdiction.
report_items.insight_zh: Practice note: 需持续观察德国法院对已终止诉讼的最终程序裁定，以及Avanci平台新增许可对中国车企参与SEP许可池的市场信号意义。
report_items.insight_en: This development highlights the continued consolidation of licensing frameworks for connected vehicles in Europe. The termination of parallel litigation alongside platform-based licensing suggests a preference for negotiated settlements among major SEP holders and automotive OEMs. Stakeholders should track how these bilateral and pool-based resolutions influence broader industry compliance trends.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Demonstrates active resolution pathways for SEP disputes involving automotive manufacturers and major licensors.
Practice note: Monitor the interplay between individual settlements and multi-pool licensing platforms like Avanci.
What to monitor: Observe procedural outcomes of terminated cases and future licensing announcements from Avanci.

report_items.title_zh: 英法院指出高通“无许可无芯片”索赔存在证据真空
report_items.title_en: UK Tribunal Approves Withdrawal of Qualcomm 'No Licence, No Chips' Claim Over Evidentiary Gaps
report_items.title: UK court observes “evidentiary void” in withdrawn Qualcomm 'no licence, no chips' claim
report_items.summary_zh: 英国竞争上诉法庭批准撤销一项4.8亿英镑的退出式集体诉讼索赔。法院指出该案存在“证据真空”，主要因为缺乏苹果和三星的证人出庭，且缺少拒绝供应的确凿证据。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Competition Appeal Tribunal has approved the discontinuance of a £480 million opt-out collective action claim against Qualcomm. The court highlighted a significant 'evidentiary void' in the case, specifically noting the absence of witness testimony from key industry players Apple and Samsung. Additionally, the tribunal found insufficient evidence to support allegations of refusal to supply, leading to the approval of the claim's withdrawal.
core_points_zh: 英国竞争上诉法庭批准撤销4.8亿英镑的退出式集体诉讼索赔
法院认定案件存在“证据真空”，缺乏苹果和三星的证人及拒绝供应证据
core_points_en: The Competition Appeal Tribunal approved the scrapping of a £480 million opt-out collective action claim against Qualcomm.
The court identified an evidentiary void due to the lack of witnesses from Apple and Samsung.
Insufficient evidence regarding refusal to supply contributed to the decision to withdraw the claim.
report_items.insight_zh: 实务观察：本案凸显了在涉及大型科技巨头的反垄断或SEP集体诉讼中，关键证人证言对于构建完整证据链的决定性作用。后续需关注此类因证据不足而撤诉的案件是否会影响其他类似诉讼的策略调整。
report_items.insight_en: This development underscores the critical importance of securing cooperation from major market participants in complex competition litigation. For rights holders and defendants alike, the inability to obtain testimony from key counterparties can create insurmountable evidentiary hurdles. Practitioners should monitor how tribunals assess evidentiary sufficiency in future collective actions involving standard-essential...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Highlights risks in collective actions where key third-party witnesses are unavailable.
Practice note: Demonstrates that tribunals will strictly scrutinize evidence of refusal to supply and market conduct.
What to monitor: Future procedural approaches to evidentiary gaps in SEP-related competition claims.

英国明确在线分销限制合规性：英上诉法院推翻初审，裁定选择性分销体系的在线销售限制非自动违法。

daily_report.executive_line_en: This week features a cooling of SEP litigation via global settlement, clarified compliance for online distribution restrictions, and structural shifts in Swiss patent examination procedures.
daily_report.summary_en: The European IP landscape this week is characterized by de-escalation in standard-essential patent disputes and increased regulatory clarity. The resolution of the Nokia-Geely conflict through a global settlement underscores the growing preference for pool licensing mechanisms like Avanci over prolonged national litigation. Concurrently, the UK Court of Appeal provided critical guidance on competition law, ruling that online sales restrictions within selective distribution systems are not automatically illegal, thereby offering brands greater flexibility in channel management while maintaining prohibitions on price-fixing. Institutional developments include the EPO’s successful maintenance of ISO certifications, ensuring operational stability, and the EUIPO’s expansion of cooperation into the Western Balkans to align regional standards. Furthermore, Switzerland’s introduction of mandatory prior-art searches and optional substantive examination marks a significant departure from its traditional formal-only regime, necessitating strategic adjustments for applicants. These shifts collectively indicate a maturing enforcement environment where procedural efficiency and compliance transp...
what_changed_vs_last_window_en: Automotive SEP disputes are shifting from aggressive litigation to structured pool licensing negotiations.
Judicial precedent now provides clearer boundaries for enforcing online distribution restrictions under competition law.
Swiss patent prosecution has structurally transitioned from formal examination to a system incorporating substantive review.
next_watch_72h_en: Monitor Avanci licensing fee structures for potential adjustments following new member integrations.
Track subsequent UK cases defining 'transparent standards' to ensure distribution policies avoid antitrust risks.
Await specific EUIPO enforcement guidelines addressing the impact of AI-generated content on IP rights.
key_moves_en: Geely joins Avanci licensing pool and withdraws pending litigation.
UK Court of Appeal upholds limited brand control over online sales channels.
EPO retains four ISO certifications, confirming operational continuity and data security.
Lamborghini identifies AI-generated imagery as a novel threat to design secrecy.
business_actions_en: Automotive manufacturers should evaluate the cost-benefit ratio of joining centralized licensing pools like Avanci to mitigate litigation exposure.
Brand owners must establish objective, transparent criteria for selective distribution models rather than imposing blanket online bans.
Entities entering the Swiss market should allocate resources for substantive examination and optimize English-language filing strategies.
watchlist_en: Qualcomm's subsequent legal strategies following the dismissal of the UK collective action claim.
Emerging case law interpreting the scope of the EU repair clause in design protection disputes.
Progress of intellectual property standard alignment in the Western Balkans region.
quick_takeaways_en: Global SEP settlements favor pool licensing over national injunctions.
Online distribution restrictions require contextual justification, not automatic prohibition.
Swiss patent strategy must adapt to new substantive examination requirements.
regional_shift_en: Increased harmonization efforts in the Western Balkans
Procedural modernization in Swiss patent administration
strategic_implications_en: Litigation risk in connected vehicle SEPs is decreasing due to standardized licensing frameworks.
Compliance teams must document objective justifications for online channel restrictions to withstand antitrust scrutiny.
Patent portfolios in Switzerland will likely see higher grant quality but increased upfront prosecution costs.

weekly_report.headline_zh: SEP和解潮起，UPC证据门槛明晰
weekly_report.headline_en: SEP Settlements Rise as UPC Clarifies Strict Evidence Preservation Standards
weekly_report.executive_line: 本周欧洲IP呈现“诉讼降温、规则细化”态势。吉利与诺基亚达成5G全球和解，标志车企许可策略转折；UPC明确证据保全四项严苛条件，提升维权举证门槛；同时TTB...
weekly_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲知识产权领域呈现结构性调整迹象。在标准必要专利（SEP）方面，吉利与诺基亚的全球和解及英国法院对高通索赔的驳回，显示司法机构对“无许可无芯片”策略持更严格审查态度，行业趋向通过Avanci等池化机制解决争议。在程序法上，UPC海牙分部确立了证据保全令的四项累积条件，显著提高了初步取证难度。此外，欧盟修订版TTBER正式生效，为专利池和FRAND许可提供新反垄断指引；德国商标恶意注册风险因AI工具滥用而激增，需高度警惕。整体而言，合规重心从单纯权利主张转向精细化证据管理与反垄断合规。

report_items.title_zh: EUIPO公布DesignEuropa奖终身成就奖得主及决赛选手
report_items.title_en: EUIPO Announces Philippe Starck as Lifetime Achievement Winner of DesignEuropa Awards 2026
report_items.title: Meet the Lifetime Achievement winner and the finalists for the 10th anniversary of the DesignEuropa Awards
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）宣布，著名设计师Philippe Starck被选为2026年DesignEuropa奖项的终身成就奖得主。该公告旨在庆祝DesignEuropa奖项成立十周年，并公布了其他决赛入围者名单。此活动由EUIPO主办，旨在提高公众对设计和知识产权保护的认识。
report_items.summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has announced that renowned designer Philippe Starck is the recipient of the Lifetime Achievement Award at the 2026 DesignEuropa Awards. This announcement coincides with the tenth anniversary of the awards program, which aims to highlight the importance of design and intellectual property protection within the European Union. The EUIPO also released the list of finalists for this year's competition.
core_points_zh: EUIPO宣布Philippe Starck获得2026年DesignEuropa终身…
此举旨在庆祝DesignEuropa奖项设立十周年
公告同时列出了该奖项的其他决赛入围者名单
core_points_en: Philippe Starck has been selected as the Lifetime Achievement Award winner for the 2026 DesignEuropa Awards.
The announcement marks the tenth anniversary of the DesignEuropa Awards initiative organized by the EUIPO.
The EUIPO published the list of finalists alongside the lifetime achievement award recipient.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This official recognition underscores the EUIPO's continued focus on promoting registered designs and the value of IP in the creative industries. For rights holders and design teams, such high-profile endorsements reinforce the cultural and commercial significance of protecting aesthetic creations under EU law. Stakeholders should note the alignment between these awards and broader EU policy goals regarding innovatio...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Highlights the institutional support for design IP, reinforcing the value proposition of registered Community designs.
Practice note: Observes the EUIPO's role in elevating design awareness through prestigious industry recognition events.
What to monitor: Review the specific finalists and winning entries to understand current trends highlighted by the office.

report_items.title_zh: EPO成功完成ISO监督审核
report_items.title_en: EPO Maintains ISO Certifications Following Successful Surveillance Audit
report_items.title: EPO successfully completes ISO surveillance audit
report_items.summary_zh: 2026年4月，欧洲专利局（EPO）顺利通过外部审计机构的管理体系ISO监督审核。此次审核确认了EPO在质量管理、职业健康安全、信息安全和环境管理方面的稳健性，维持了其ISO 9001、ISO 45001、ISO 27001及ISO 14001认证。这体现了EPO对国际标准及合规性的承诺，并通过综合管理体系支持高质量服务交付。
report_items.summary_en: In April 2026, the European Patent Office (EPO) successfully completed its periodic ISO surveillance audit conducted by external auditors. The review confirmed the continued robustness and maturity of the EPO’s integrated management systems, allowing the organization to maintain its certifications for quality management (ISO 9001), occupational health and safety (ISO 45001), information security (ISO 27001), and environmental management (ISO 14001). This outcome underscores the EPO’s adherence to international standards and regulatory compliance. By aligning policies, processes, and controls w...
core_points_zh: EPO于2026年4月通过外部审计机构的ISO管理体系监督审核
维持ISO 9001、45001、27001及14001四项国际认证，确认体系成熟稳健
通过综合管理体系整合政策流程，确保持续改进及服务交付质量
core_points_en: The EPO passed its April 2026 external ISO surveillance audit, confirming ongoing adherence to international management standards.
Certifications maintained include ISO 9001 for quality, ISO 27001 for information security, ISO 45001 for safety, and ISO 14001 for environment.
The EPO utilizes an Integrated Management System to unify policies and controls, supporting service quality and continuous operational improvement.
report_items.insight_zh: 此新闻属于EPO内部行政与合规动态，不直接改变专利实体法或审查标准。实务中需关注其信息安全（ISO 27001）与质量管理（ISO 9001）的持续合规，这间接保障了电子提交系统及审查流程的稳定性与数据安全性，是评估EPO服务可靠性的基础指标。
report_items.insight_en: This update confirms the administrative and operational stability of the EPO rather than introducing changes to substantive patent law or examination guidelines. For rights holders and legal practitioners, the maintenance of ISO 27001 and ISO 9001 certifications serves as a key indicator of the reliability and data security standards underpinning the EPO’s electronic filing systems and procedural workflows. While thi...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: EPO运营稳定性与数据安全合规性保障
Practice note/实务观察: 关注EPO管理体系认证状态对服务连续性的影响
What to monitor/后续观察: 无具体法律变动，仅需知悉机构合规状态更新
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Confirms the stability and data security compliance of EPO operations, indirectly supporting the reliability of electronic submission channels and case processin…
Practice note: Monitor the status of EPO management system certifications as baseline indicators for service continuity and operational maturity.
What to monitor: No immediate legal or procedural changes; treat as routine compliance confirmation regarding institutional operational standards.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟资助IP合作扩展至西巴尔干地区
report_items.title_en: EUIPO Launches EU-Funded IP Cooperation Project in Western Balkans
report_items.title: EU-funded IP cooperation expands into the Western Balkans
report_items.summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，一项新的欧盟资助合作项目正在与扩大伙伴国开展，旨在支持这些国家在加入欧盟之前实现知识产权标准的对齐。该项目由欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）发布，聚焦于通过合作促进法律与实践的协调，为未来的欧盟成员资格做准备。
report_items.summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has announced a new cooperation project funded by the European Union. This initiative targets enlargement partners in the Western Balkans, aiming to support the alignment of their intellectual property standards with those of the European Union. The project serves as a preparatory measure for these countries ahead of potential future EU accession.
core_points_zh: 标题显示欧盟资助的新合作项目已扩展至西巴尔干地区
原文摘要显示项目旨在支持伙伴国在入盟前对齐欧盟知识产权标准
core_points_en: A new EU-funded cooperation project targets enlargement partners in the Western Balkans region.
The initiative focuses on aligning local intellectual property standards with European Union frameworks.
The project supports regulatory harmonization efforts preceding potential EU accession.
report_items.insight_zh: Practice note / What to monitor：需持续观察该合作项目的具体实施范围、涵盖的知识产权领域（如商标、专利或外观设计）以及具体的时间表。鉴于正文信息有限，目前仅能确认其为入盟前的标准对齐举措，尚无法评估对特定行业权利人的直接影响。
report_items.insight_en: This development highlights ongoing regulatory convergence efforts between the EU and candidate countries. For rights holders operating across Europe, monitoring the implementation of these alignment measures is relevant for understanding future market entry conditions and enforcement landscapes in the Western Balkans. The focus remains on legislative and administrative harmonization rather than immediate procedural...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should track regulatory alignment in the Western Balkans to anticipate future market integration and enforcement environments.
Practice note: The project emphasizes pre-accession standard alignment, indicating long-term legislative harmonization goals for IP systems in the region.
What to monitor: Specific timelines, covered IP sectors, and detailed implementation steps of the cooperation project remain to be defined.

report_items.title_zh: UPC海牙分部：证据保全令需满足四项累积条件
report_items.title_en: UPC Hague: Evidence Production Orders Require Cumulative Conditions and Proportionality
report_items.title: LD The Hague, May 11, 2026, Order, UPC-CFI_478/2025, UPC_CFI_585/2026
report_items.summary_zh: UPC海牙地方法院裁定，依据《程序规则》第190条及《统一专利法院协定》第59(1)条，发布证据保全令需满足四项累积条件：初步证据、对方控制下的特定证据、保密保护及比例原则。法院援引Winnow v Orbisk等先例，指出已授权欧洲专利具有有效性推定，除非明显无效。鉴于侵权验证需物理测试，法院批准获取部分产品样本及营销材料，但基于比例原则缩减了样本数量。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Local Division in The Hague clarified the requirements for evidence production orders under Rule 190 of the Rules of Procedure and Article 59(1) of the Unified Patent Court Agreement. The Court established that four cumulative conditions must be met: plausible evidence, specified evidence within the opposing party's control, confidentiality protection, and proportionality. Citing Winnow v Orbisk and Oppo v Panasonic, the judgment affirmed that granted European patents carry a presumption of validity, which is only displaced by clear-cut invalidity. The Court reduced the requested physi...
core_points_zh: 证据保全令需满足初步证据、特定性、保密性及比例原则四项累积条件
已授权欧洲专利享有有效性推定，仅明显无效情形可推翻该推定
为验证依赖测试的侵权，可下令提供物理样本，但需符合比例原则限制范围
core_points_en: Rule 190 RoP and Article 59(1) UPCA require plausible evidence, specific controlled evidence, confidentiality, and proportionality.
Granted European patents benefit from a validity presumption unless a clear-cut case of invalidity is demonstrated at this stage.
Physical samples may be ordered for necessary testing, but requests are strictly limited by proportionality principles.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC在证据保全阶段的审查标准，强调了对已授权专利有效性的尊重及比例原则的适用。实务中，申请人需确保证据请求的具体性与必要性，避免过度索取。对于依赖物理测试认定侵权的案件，提前规划测试方案并论证样本获取的必要性至关重要。
report_items.insight_en: This decision reinforces the structured approach of the UPC towards pre-trial evidence gathering, balancing the rights holder's need to verify infringement against the defendant's interest in avoiding disproportionate burdens. It confirms that while patent validity is presumed, the specificity and necessity of requested evidence remain subject to rigorous judicial scrutiny. For practitioners, the ruling highlights th...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: 明确UPC证据保全门槛，指导专利维权策略
Practice note/实务观察: 论证样本获取必要性时需结合具体测试需求与比例原则
What to monitor/后续观察: 关注UPC对“明显无效”标准的进一步界定及…
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Clarifies the high threshold for obtaining evidence production orders, requiring precise justification of necessity and proportionality.
Practice note: When seeking physical samples for test-dependent infringement, limit requests to the minimum viable set to satisfy proportionality requirements.
What to monitor: How the UPC further defines 'clear-cut' invalidity cases that might displace the presumption of validity during evidence stages.

report_items.title_zh: CJEU需裁定：前药是否可独立获得SPC保护？
report_items.title_en: CJEU Asked to Rule on SPC Eligibility for Pro-Drugs of Previously Approved Actives
report_items.title: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟法院（CJEU）受理新案件（C-794/25），需裁定已获批活性成分的前药能否独立获得欧盟SPC保护。背景涉及武田的LDX（右旋苯丙胺前药），其虽获新药上市许可，但母体药物DEX早已上市。争议焦点在于前药是否被视为“不同”的活性物质，该裁决将澄清行业规则并解决相关诉讼。
report_items.summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU) has received a new referral (Case C-794/25) concerning whether an approved pro-drug of a previously authorized active pharmaceutical ingredient qualifies for Supplementary Protection Certificate (SPC) protection independently. The case centers on lisdexamfetamine (LDX), a pro-drug of dexamphetamine (DEX). Although DEX is a long-established generic, LDX was granted marketing authorization as a New Active Substance due to its distinct safety and efficacy profile. The CJEU must determine if such derivatives constitute separate active substances un...
core_points_zh: CJEU被要求裁定已获批活性成分的前药在欧盟是否可独立获得SPC保护
案件背景涉及武田的LDX及其母体药物DEX，争议在于前药是否构成不同的活性物质
裁决结果旨在为制药行业提供法律确定性，并解决该领域的现有诉讼争议
core_points_en: CJEU referral C-794/25 addresses whether pro-drugs of known actives can secure independent SPC protection in the EU.
Lisdexamfetamine was authorized as a New Active Substance despite being a metabolic derivative of older drug dexamphetamine.
The ruling will interpret Article 10.2.b of the Medicinal Products Directive regarding significant differences in safety or efficacy.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案核心在于解释《药品指令》中关于活性物质衍生的定义。若CJEU认定前药可独立获SPC，将显著延长创新药的市场独占期；反之则可能限制基于已知分子结构的改良型创新的专利策略。企业需密切关注判决对SPC申请策略的影响。
report_items.insight_en: This referral highlights critical uncertainties in defining 'active substance' for SPC purposes when dealing with molecular derivatives. The outcome will significantly impact portfolio strategies for lifecycle management and second-generation medicines. Rights holders must assess how the court balances regulatory definitions of New Active Substances against the strict requirements for SPC eligibility under Regulation...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Determines potential for extending market exclusivity via SPCs for improved formulations of legacy drugs.
Practice note: Evaluate if derivative compounds meet the threshold for differing significantly in safety or efficacy profiles.
What to monitor: Watch for the CJEU's interpretation of 'different salts, esters, ethers' versus distinct active substances in SPC contexts.

report_items.title_zh: 德国商标申请中的恶意注册：企业日益增长的风险
report_items.title_en: German Bad Faith Trademark Filings: DPMA Warns of Rising Strategic Abuse Risks
report_items.title: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析德国商标法中“恶意”（Bösgläubigkeit）概念的应用与风险。德国专利商标局指出，自2025年中以来，针对未注册商标的恶意申请激增，常利用AI工具识别目标并通过电商平台施压。依据《德国商标法》，缺乏真实使用意图且旨在阻碍竞争或获取不当利益的申请将被驳回或宣告无效。该认定需综合评估申请人主观意图与客观情况，受欧盟判例影响显著。
report_items.summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has highlighted a significant increase in potentially bad-faith trademark applications since mid-2025. These filings often target signs already used by third parties without formal protection, aiming to exert competitive pressure rather than indicate commercial origin. The DPMA attributes this trend to technological developments, such as AI tools facilitating the identification of unregistered signs, and online marketplace enforcement mechanisms that allow swift blocking of third parties. Under the German Trademark Act (MarkenG), applications file...
core_points_zh: 德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击
德国商标法规定，无真实使用意图且旨在滥用权利的注册可被驳回或在事后宣告无效
恶意认定需结合主观意图与客观环境综合评估，德国司法实践深受欧盟法院判例影响
core_points_en: DPMA reports a surge in bad-faith filings targeting unregistered signs used by third parties for strategic leverage.
AI tools and online marketplace enforcement mechanisms facilitate rapid identification and blocking of competitors.
German law excludes registration or allows invalidation of marks filed without genuine intent to use.
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧中国企业而言，应尽早完成核心品牌在德注册以确立权利基础，避免被抢注。同时需建立主动监控机制，警惕竞争对手利用恶意注册通过电商平台快速下架产品。面对此类指控，应积极收集在先使用证据，援引德国商标法关于恶意的规定提起无效宣告请求，维护市场地位。
report_items.insight_en: This development underscores the increasing scrutiny of applicant intent in German practice, aligning with broader EU trends. Rights holders must recognize that mere registration is no longer an absolute shield against challenges based on bad faith. Proactive portfolio management is essential to mitigate risks associated with strategic filings designed to disrupt market access or extract undue advantages through enfo...
insight_points_zh: 尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险
遭遇恶意指控时，应积极收集在先使用证据，依法提起无效宣告以维权
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Early registration remains critical to secure rights, but businesses must also prepare defenses against bad-faith challenges.

report_items.title: How to plan successful IP mediation

report_items.summary_en: Mediation offers a confidential, cost-effective alternative to litigation for resolving intellectual property disputes, particularly benefiting SMEs and individuals. The World Intellectual Property Organization reported a 42% increase in administered cases in 2025, with significant participation from non-corporate entities. In Europe, the landscape is expanding with the EUIPO Mediation Centre extending its services to all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and designs as of June 2025. Furthermore, the Unified Patent Court will inaugurate its Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre in J...
core_points_zh: 调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高
EUIPO扩大调解范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解仲裁中心
调解灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供超越诉讼的商业双赢方案
core_points_en: WIPO recorded a 42% rise in IP mediation cases in 2025, with SMEs and individuals comprising 59% of involved parties.
The EUIPO Mediation Centre expanded its scope in June 2025 to cover all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and registered designs.
The Unified Patent Court will launch its Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre in June 2026, enhancing European ADR options.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临IP纠纷时，应优先考虑利用EUIPO及即将成立的UPC调解机制。相比传统诉讼，调解成本更低且能保护商业秘密，尤其适合中小企业。建议提前在合同中加入调解条款，并熟悉WIPO等机构的规则，以灵活应对侵权或许可谈判，避免高昂 litigation 风险。
report_items.insight_en: The expansion of institutional mediation frameworks in Europe provides rights holders with structured avenues to resolve cross-border IP conflicts efficiently. For portfolio managers and legal teams, integrating these mechanisms can facilitate commercially focused settlements that courts may not offer. Understanding the procedural nuances of WIPO, EUIPO, and upcoming UPC facilities allows parties to leverage confiden...
insight_points_zh: 优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险
建议在合同中预设调解条款，灵活运用ADR解决跨境IP争议
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Institutional mediation offers confidential, commercially oriented resolutions for IP disputes, reducing reliance on public litigation.
Practice note: Consider incorporating mandatory mediation clauses in commercial agreements to utilize EUIPO and future UPC dispute resolution services.
What to monitor: Track the operational rollout of the UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre scheduled for June 2026.

report_items.title_zh: 英国上诉法院就选择性分销体系在线限制发布指引
report_items.title_en: UK Court of Appeal Clarifies Online Sales Restrictions in Selective Distribution Systems
report_items.title: UK Court of Appeal issues guidance on online restrictions in selective distribution systems
report_items.summary_zh: 英国上诉法院在Deckers诉Up & Running案中裁定，品牌方禁止授权零售商在未品牌折扣网站销售不违反竞争法，推翻竞争上诉法庭原判。法院确认此类在线限制需结合法律与经济背景评估损害程度，而非自动违法。此举虽未放松对转售价格维持等核心限制的执法，但强调品牌应建立透明、客观的分销标准以规避诉讼风险。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Court of Appeal overturned a Competition Appeal Tribunal ruling, holding that Deckers did not breach competition law by preventing an authorised retailer from selling on an unbranded discount website. The judgment confirms that restrictions on online channels within selective distribution systems are not automatically illegal. Instead, they require a careful assessment of legal and economic context to establish a sufficient degree of harm, aligning with established case law such as Coty. While this clarifies the treatment of channel restrictions, it does not signal leniency towards hard...
core_points_zh: 在线销售限制非自动违法，需个案评估法律经济背景及损害程度
上诉法院推翻初审判决，支持品牌方管控未品牌折扣渠道的合规性
企业应避免价格固定等核心限制，通过透明标准降低反垄断诉讼风险
core_points_en: Restrictions on online sales channels in selective distribution are not presumed illegal but require contextual analysis of harm.
The Court of Appeal ruled that banning sales on unbranded discount websites by authorised retailers does not inherently breach competition law.
Hardcore restrictions such as resale price maintenance and blanket online bans remain strictly prohibited under current enforcement standards.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国出口欧洲的品牌商需警惕选择性分销中的在线限制合规性。建议避免直接禁止线上销售或固定价格，转而制定基于品牌形象和防止搭便车的客观准入标准。完善合同条款与证据留存，可有效应对潜在的反垄断调查与民事诉讼，保障供应链稳定。
report_items.insight_en: This decision provides important clarity for brands operating selective distribution networks in the UK and EU. It reinforces that channel architecture controls can be lawful if justified by brand positioning or network integrity, rather than being treated as per se violations. However, rights holders must distinguish these legitimate quality controls from hardcore anti-competitive practices. Maintaining transparent...
insight_points_zh: 制定基于品牌定位的客观分销标准，避免 blanket ban 线上销售
严禁转售价格维持等核心限制，完善合规文档以应对反垄断审查
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands can defend channel restrictions by demonstrating they protect brand image and prevent free-riding, avoiding automatic illegality findings.
Practice note: Document transparent, objective criteria for selective distribution models, specifically regarding website standards and third-party marketplace usage.
What to monitor: Continued enforcement actions against resale price maintenance and online sales restrictions by the European Commission and national competition authorities.

report_items.title_zh: 瑞士通过专利法修订引入实质审查制度
report_items.title_en: Switzerland Reforms Patent Act with Mandatory Searches and Optional Substantive Examination
report_items.title: Switzerland introduces substantive examinations with Patent Act reform
report_items.summary_zh: 2024年3月，瑞士联邦议会通过《专利法》部分修订案。此次改革核心在于引入强制性的现有技术检索，并允许申请人选择是否进行全面的实质审查。此外，新规接受英文技术文件，并建立了新的上诉系统。这一变革标志着瑞士从形式审查向更严格的审查模式转变，旨在提升专利质量与法律确定性，对在该国进行专利布局的企业将产生深远影响。
report_items.summary_en: In March 2024, the Swiss Federal Assembly passed a partial revision of the Patent Act, introducing significant procedural changes. Key amendments include the implementation of a mandatory prior-art search and an optional full substantive examination system. The reform also allows for the acceptance of English-language technical documents and establishes a new appeal mechanism. These measures mark a shift towards enhanced patent quality and legal certainty within the Swiss jurisdiction.
core_points_zh: 瑞士联邦议会于2024年3月通过《专利法》部分修订案
引入强制性现有技术检索及可选的全面实质审查机制
接受英文技术文档并建立全新的专利上诉系统
core_points_en: The revised Swiss Patent Act introduces a mandatory prior-art search requirement for all patent applications filed in Switzerland.
Applicants may now opt for a full substantive examination, moving beyond the previous formal examination framework.
The reform permits the submission of English-language technical documents and implements a new appellate structure.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业赴瑞士申请专利需适应新流程，强制检索可能增加前期成本与时间。建议提前规划现有技术分析，利用英文文件便利降低翻译成本。同时，关注实质审查的可选性，根据商业价值权衡投入，以应对更高的授权门槛和潜在的驳回风险。
report_items.insight_en: This legislative update alters the procedural landscape for patent registration in Switzerland. Rights holders should note the introduction of mandatory searches and the option for substantive review, which may impact prosecution timelines and grant probabilities. The acceptance of English documentation offers potential administrative efficiencies for international applicants managing European portfolios.
insight_points_zh: 适应强制检索要求，优化前期现有技术分析与预算规划
善用英文文件政策降低成本，审慎评估实质审查的商业必要性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor how the optional substantive examination affects grant rates and portfolio strength in the Swiss market.
Practice note: Leverage the new allowance for English-language technical documents to streamline filing procedures where applicable.
What to monitor: Track the implementation timeline and specific guidelines for the newly established appeal system.

First, The EPO passed its April 2026 external ISO surveillance audit, confirming ongoing adherence to international management. Why it matters: Confirms the stability and data security compliance of EPO operations, indirectly supporting the reliability of electronic submission c.
Next, A new EU-funded cooperation project targets enlargement partners in the Western Balkans region. Why it matters: Rights holders should track regulatory alignment in the Western Balkans to anticipate future market integration and enforcement environ.
Next, The UPC released its second Annual Review, offering a comprehensive statistical and operational overview of the court's. Why it matters: The report offers data-driven insights into UPC activity levels, helping rights holders contextualize litigation timelines and court ca.
Finally, Restrictions on online sales channels in selective distribution are not presumed illegal but require contextual analysis. Why it matters: Brands can defend channel restrictions by demonstrating they protect brand image and prevent free-riding, avoiding automatic illegality.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on Patents, General IP, SEPs. The next point to watch is Qualcomm's subsequent legal strategies following the dismissal of the UK collective action claim.

topics.headline_en: UPC Case Law Deepens, PMAC Live
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，统一专利法院（UPC）发布年报并上线PMAC调解系统，强化ADR替代性争议解决能力。司法实践上，杜塞尔多夫等分院在等同侵权、权利要求解释及临时禁令举证标准上形成明确倾向，强调程序合规与证据比例原则。企业需警惕单一零部件直接侵权风险，利用PMAC降低维权成本，并严格把控上诉期限与管辖权节点，以优化在欧专利布局与应诉策略。
key_points: PMAC程序规则获批且案件管理系统上线，提供涵盖SEP/FRAND的调解仲裁服务，为低成本解决纠纷提供新路径。
司法判例确立等同侵权累积要件及功能性限定解释规则，单独销售组件可能构成直接侵权，临时措施举证门槛提高。
程序合规要求趋严，上诉期自附理由判决日起算，登录系统不视为应诉，但逾期或程序违规将导致权利丧失。
actions: 评估使用PMAC调解机制处理潜在专利纠纷，特别是涉及标准必要专利（SEP）时，以降低诉讼成本和时间。
审查对欧出口产品的专利权利要求布局，避免功能性限定语言，排查单一零部件被认定为直接侵权的风险。
建立严格的UPC诉讼期限双重核查机制，谨慎对待首次答辩以控制管辖权，并利用撤诉规则争取和解空间。
watchlist: 关注UPC主要分部早期判例对专利法解释的固化趋势，避免过度依赖特定法庭带来的战略风险。
监测欧洲层面关于PMAC配套安排及官方口径的后续动向，评估其在跨境纠纷中的实际效力。
追踪单一专利保护在地域缺失（如马耳他）情况下的适用极限，规划传统验证与单一专利的组合策略。

Judicial practice has clarified key standards: divisions in Düsseldorf and The Hague established cumulative criteria for infringement by equivalence and strict rules for interpreting functional claim limitations. Courts emphasized procedural compliance and proportionality, particularly regarding evidence production and provisional measures. Review patent claim layouts for products exported to Europe to avoid overly broad functional language and assess the risk that single components might be deemed directly infringing...

topics.headline_zh: 欧洲SEP诉讼：UPC强势与英国费率裁定
topics.headline_en: UPC Injunctions and UK Global FRAND Rates Reshape SEP Litigation
topics.summary_zh: 2025-2026年，统一专利法院（UPC）成为NPE维权主战场，频繁签发禁令并强化反禁诉令以对抗中国临时许可。英国法院确立全球FRAND费率裁定权，如三星诉中兴案判赔3.92亿美元，同时上诉法院倾向仲裁解决争议。监管层面，欧盟修订TTBER明确专利池合规指引，UKIPO推进SEP改革。中国企业面临管辖权冲突加剧、许可成本上升及反垄断审查风险，需重构全球许可策略。
key_points: UPC战略升级：NPE利用UPC程序优势发起攻击，法院积极签发AASI保护管辖权，拒绝完全隔离涉密员工，强调公平审判。
英国费率主导：英高院裁定三星-中兴全球交叉许可费率为3.92亿美元，确立可比协议法；上诉法院在诺基亚案中确认仲裁条款可中止司法干预。
监管与合规：欧盟新版TTBER生效，细化专利池与集体谈判竞争法指南；UKIPO启动SEP政策改革以解决透明度问题；美欧在汽车专利联盟反垄断立场上出现分歧。
actions: 前置谈判与意愿表达：收到侵权通知须立即书面表达许可意愿，避免被认定为‘不愿被许可人’而丧失抗辩权或面临禁令。
规避管辖陷阱：审慎应对中国临时许可申请，预判UPC及德国法院的反禁诉令风险；优先评估仲裁条款效力，争取通过仲裁解决费率争议。
合规体系重构：依据新版TTBER审查现有许可协议，加强内部SEP必要性管理；积极参与UKIPO咨询，利用专利池简化多标准许可流程。
watchlist: 英国最高法院对特斯拉等案件关于全球FRAND管辖权的最终裁决走向。
UKIPO SEP改革政策细则落地时间及对现有许可模式的冲击。
UPC在ZTE诉三星等平行诉讼中关于管辖权优先级的后续协调机制。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: Between 2025 and 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) has emerged as a primary venue for standard-essential patent (SEP) enforcement, frequently issuing injunctions and anti-anti-suit injunctions to protect jurisdiction against foreign interim licenses. Concurrently, English courts have solidified their role in determining global Fair, Reasonable, and Non-Discriminatory (FRAND) rates, notably establishing precedents for cross-licensing valuations while signaling a preference for arbitration. Regulatory developments include updated EU competition guidelines for patent pools and ongoing UK intellectual property reforms aimed at enhancing licensing transparency. These shifts create complex jurisdictional conflicts and increased compliance risks for multinational entities. Companies must navigate divergent transatlantic antitrust approaches and restructure global licensing strategies to miti...
key_points_en: The UPC actively safeguards its jurisdiction by issuing anti-anti-suit injunctions against foreign interim licenses, while refining procedural fairness through licensing bars rathe...
English courts have established robust frameworks for calculating global FRAND rates in cross-licensing scenarios, adjusting historical rates for litigation disadvantages and confi...
Regulatory divergence is increasing, with the EU clarifying patent pool compliance under revised TTBER rules while US authorities scrutinize collective automotive licensing groups...
actions_en: Immediately document willingness to license upon receiving infringement notices to avoid being classified as an unwilling licensee and forfeiting FRAND defenses against injunctions...
Anticipate UPC anti-anti-suit injunction risks when seeking foreign interim relief; prioritize evaluating arbitration clause validity to resolve rate disputes outside of direct jur...
Review existing licensing agreements against new EU competition guidelines and internal SEP management protocols to ensure compliance with evolving transparency standards and poten...
watchlist_en: Final determinations by the UK Supreme Court regarding the scope of global FRAND jurisdiction in pending high-profile cases.
Implementation timelines and specific details of UKIPO policy reforms addressing SEP transparency and essentiality determination mechanisms.
Procedural coordination mechanisms developed by the UPC to manage parallel litigation and jurisdictional priorities in multi-jurisdictional SEP disputes.

topics.headline_en: EUIPO IP Financing, Case Law Shifts, and Compliance Risks
topics.summary_zh: 2026年Q2，EUIPO联合EIF推动IP质押融资，释放创新资金红利。司法层面，普通法院强化在先权利声誉评估，CJEU明确异议期间权利须持续有效，德国严打AI恶意抢注。同时，欧盟手工艺GI首案落地，动态商标技术功能限制趋严。企业需把握融资机遇，优化维权策略，防范注册风险。
key_points: 金融赋能：EUIPO与EIF合作解锁IP支持型融资，报告建议释放5800亿欧元创新信贷，降低中小企业门槛。
司法收紧：普通法院撤销武器类“Obelix”商标无效决定，强调全局评估声誉；CJEU裁定异议中在先权利须在决定时持续有效。
合规预警：德国警示AI辅助恶意抢注激增；纯技术功能动态商标因缺乏显著性被驳回；利摩日瓷器获首个欧盟手工艺GI。
actions: 利用EUIPO SME基金及新融资政策，规划高性价比的欧盟商标布局与资产抵押融资方案。
建立异议期权利动态监控机制，确保证书续展及使用合规；遭遇恶意指控时积极收集在先使用证据维权。
规避纯技术功能外观申请，尽早完成核心市场注册并建立监测体系，防范AI恶意抢注导致的电商下架风险。
watchlist: 关注EUIPO关于判例法指导IP决策的具体配套安排及官方口径更新。
追踪欧盟IP融资政策在西巴尔干等扩展区域的落地情况及具体操作细则。
监测欧洲层面针对AI生成内容及在线执法纠纷的法律框架适应性调整进展。
topics.summary_en: In Q2 2026, the EUIPO partnered with the European Investment Fund to facilitate intellectual property-backed financing, aiming to unlock capital for innovative enterprises. Judicial developments include the General Court emphasizing comprehensive reputation assessment in invalidity proceedings and the CJEU ruling that earlier rights must remain valid at the time of the EUIPO decision. Concurrently, authorities warn of rising bad-faith filings aided by AI tools, while courts strictly limit motion marks based on technical functionality. The first craft geographical indication was registered under the new EU framework. Rights holders should leverage new funding mechanisms, ensure continuous validity of cited rights during oppositions, and strengthen monitoring against strategic abuse to optimize asset value and mitigate registration risks.

Compliance Risks: Authorities report a surge in AI-assisted bad-faith filings targeting unregistered signs, while pure technical motion marks face rejection; meanwhile, the first c...
actions_en: Evaluate eligibility for EUIPO financial support programs and integrate IP valuation into corporate asset strategies to secure cost-effective EU-wide trademark coverage and potenti...
Implement dynamic monitoring of prior rights validity during oppositions and maintain robust evidence of use to withstand scrutiny, ensuring cited rights do not lapse before final...
Avoid registering purely functional designs or motion marks lacking distinctive features, and establish proactive watch services to detect and challenge bad-faith applications targ...
watchlist_en: Monitor EUIPO publications detailing how case law influences administrative examination guidelines and decision-making processes within the EU trademark system.
Track the implementation of IP cooperation projects in enlargement regions, such as the Western Balkans, to anticipate regulatory harmonization and future enforcement environments.
Observe legislative and judicial adaptations regarding AI-generated content and online enforcement mechanisms to address emerging challenges in digital marketplace compliance.

topics.headline_en: UKIPO Warns of Risks from Counterfeit Ink and Toner Cartridges
topics.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局警示假冒碳粉危害，指出造假者常免责且不赔偿。全球假冒贸易额高达4670亿美元，多关联有组织犯罪。出口企业需建立合规溯源体系以防范供应链指控；进口商应加强供应商尽调，避免采购不明来源低价耗材，强化品牌保护与防伪措施。
key_points: 假冒碳粉致损严重且造假者常免责不赔
全球假冒贸易达4670亿美元并关联有组织犯罪
需建立合规溯源体系及加强供应商尽职调查
actions: 建立产品合规溯源体系防范供应链指控
加强进口供应商尽职调查规避低价风险
强化品牌防伪保护措施应对假冒威胁
watchlist: 欧盟及英国海关对假冒耗材执法力度变化
跨国假冒犯罪网络打击行动进展
相关知识产权免责条款司法判例更新
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued a warning regarding the significant operational and financial risks associated with counterfeit ink and toner cartridges. Citing an OECD and EUIPO report, the agency estimates the global trade in counterfeit goods at approximately USD 467 billion, noting strong links to organized crime networks. A critical concern highlighted is that manufacturers of fake consumables often evade liability for equipment damage caused by defective products, leaving businesses without recourse. The blog emphasizes that online marketplaces frequently facilitate the sale of these illicit items through third-party sellers. Consequently, organizations are urged to strengthen their procurement systems to prevent such goods from infiltrating their supply chains. This advisory underscores the necessity for robust verification processes and contractual safeguards to pr...
key_points_en: Counterfeit print consumables cause serious operational issues and lack manufacturer liability for resulting damages.
Global counterfeit trade is valued at approximately USD 467 billion with established links to organized crime networks.
Online third-party sellers frequently offer counterfeit goods, requiring robust procurement systems to prevent infiltration.
actions_en: Review procurement contracts to ensure supplier warranties explicitly cover equipment damage from defective consumables.
Implement visual and functional verification steps for high-volume consumable purchases to distinguish genuine from fake items.
Strengthen supplier due diligence protocols to mitigate risks associated with low-priced or unverified sourcing channels.
watchlist_en: Changes in enforcement intensity by EU and UK customs authorities regarding counterfeit printing consumables.
Progress in cross-border operations targeting organized criminal networks involved in counterfeiting.
Updates in judicial precedents concerning liability exemptions and warranty claims related to intellectual property infringement.
